note: Canonical transport-vocabulary blocklist (spec §1.5/§17). ONE copy — shipped in-crate as mcpmesh_local_api::TRANSPORT_VOCABULARY and consumed by mcpmesh's own surface-leak suite (cli/tests/daemon_autostart.rs); embedders vendor or re-export it, never fork the terms. 'serial'/'relay' match as whole IDENTIFIER tokens (_ is a word char) so domain compounds like index_serial never false-trip (R4). Carve-outs are spec-canonical identifiers that legitimately embed a banned substring.
